name: Broad Cardiovascular Disease Diagnosis Codes
description: Broad ICD-10-CM code set for cardiovascular disease including essential hypertension, hypertensive heart disease, angina pectoris, acute and chronic ischemic heart disease, atrial fibrillation/flutter, heart failure, cerebral infarction, precerebral artery occlusion/stenosis, and atherosclerosis. Used in cardiovascular disease management, statin therapy, and cardiac risk quality measures. Note: VS_CARDIOVASCULAR_ICD10 also exists with a partially overlapping set focused on ASCVD/coronary/peripheral disease.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
